drl:
rule "R0"
salience 5
no-loop
when
    ( T1(f0 <= 2.0, $b0_0_0 : f2) )
    or
    ( T1(f0 <= 2.0, $b0_0_0 : f2) )
    or
    ( T1(f0 <= 2.0, $b0_0_0 : f2) )
then
    insertLogical(new T2("", -3.0));
end
rule "R1"
salience 10
when
    accumulate( T2(f1 >= -3.0, $s1_0 : f1); $a1_0 : max($s1_0) )
then
end
rule "R2"
no-loop
when
    ( T2($b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )
    or
    ( T2($b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )

rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f0 < 0.0, f2 == false)

    insertLogical(new T2("b", -3.0));
    insertLogical(new T2("alpha", $p3_0.getF0()));
    $p3_0.setF2(true);
    $p3_0.setF0(4.0);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T1(f1 >= -0.5, $b4_0_0 : f1, f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T2("ab", $p4_0.getF1()));
    $p4_0.setF2(true);
    update($p4_0);
end
rule "R5"
when
